methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Einride
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.8B

private.name: Harbinger
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series C), post-money $500M

data.narrative:
Candela is a Series C transportation-tech company that has raised €129M+ to date. The relevant peer universe comprises seven private companies in the transportation sector, including Einride, Harbinger, Rivian, The Boring Company, and REGENT Craft, with no public comparables available for direct benchmarking.

Peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable here. The narrow peer set yields only two same-stage companies and zero adjacent-stage or similar-tier private comparables—below the three-datapoint threshold required for reliable median analysis. An all-sector median approach would introduce unacceptable noise given the heterogeneity of transportation subsegments represented in the broader peer pool.

Without sufficient clustering of directly comparable financings or exit multiples, this analysis cannot defensibly anchor a valuation range using standard triangulation methods. The sparse, dispersed nature of the peer set—combining hardware-heavy transportation infrastructure plays, autonomous vehicle platforms, and point-solution businesses—precludes meaningful statistical inference. Resolution of valuation would require additional data on recent Series C rounds within the narrower competitive band, revenue or customer metrics for the peer set, or disclosed transaction multiples from comparable-stage exits. Until such data materializes, quantitative valuation synthesis for Candela remains constrained.
